message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
Welcome back
Ouch!
You seem to be bursting with energy.
That boss sounds completely worn out.
Thank you for your hard work. Did anything good happen?
Welcome back, Boss.
Look
Talk

To another place.
Save.
End the game.
I guess I can't help but blankly stare at it; it's a habit from my free time.
I've been really tired lately.
Is there anything interesting around?
What a pointless thing to do.
I'm always glued to my computer screen; what in the world am I doing?
Even if I was playing a game, I wouldn't know.
It's so quiet when I'm facing the computer.
Boss, what was that about Gabriela?
Looking for people again.
Are we looking for people again!? It feels more like a people-finding agency than a detective office.
Right, Boss, how about we go for some relaxation?
Relaxation?
Yes! I'll take you to my favorite place. When you're feeling down, playing is the way to go!
Boss!
You seem really tired, don't you?
You've been quite busy lately, but please take care of your health.
Have you reported to Meryl?
Yeah.
Somehow.
Her?
The request is ongoing; we must absolutely find Ariana Kleiberg.
That's tough, isn't it?
By the way, is Meryl's daughter's name Ariana Kleiberg?
Do you have any idea who that is?
No, I was just confirming.
But, this is quite a pickle. It seems like it's going to be super hard to find.
You're right; I'm feeling so drained and want to give up.
Boss!
Let's hang in there!
Boss, please don't give up and do your best.
Any news from Meryl?
No, not yet.
Boss, you should say it sooner. If you carry something heavy in your heart, it'll start to take a toll on you.
I haven't heard from Meryl, but I think it's better to go report sooner.
Did you meet San?
Yeah, I went to see them. They seemed surprisingly fine, almost like nothing was wrong.
So that means the counseling worked, right? I'm glad I referred them.
The teacher is a great person, so it'll be fine. You can feel at ease.
Maybe I should go see them once.
Günter is a busy person, so you shouldn't disturb him.
But is it really that easy to recover?
Maybe it means it wasn't as bad as we thought?
Ah, maybe that's the case.
But is it really that simple?
Boss.
Are you worried about something?
You should just honestly be happy about their recovery.
Did you get a message from them?
No. If they keep going to counseling, they should be doing better.
That's true.
Are you worried about something?
The teacher is a great person, so it'll be fine. You can feel at ease.
Maybe I should go see them once.
You mean San?
No, I mean the teacher. I want to see what they are like.
Günter is a busy person, so you shouldn't disturb him.
Boss, please don't cause any trouble for the teacher.
It's better to forget about Guy.
Why are you suddenly saying that?
Because there's been no contact or anything.
I wish Guy would just die somewhere.
You shouldn’t say stuff like that.
Since San is suffering, they should receive their due reward.
I absolutely hate Guy.
Seems like the media hasn't leaked anything about Cindy. Kind of mysterious.
Gloria must be holding things down tightly.
Isn’t this just a ridiculous disappearing act?
Director Fabar is terrible too. Bringing such a weird issue to the Boss.
But, that’s a kind gesture.
To be honest, it’s a case of small kindness being a big hassle.
I feel like I’ve been tricked by a fox.
I don’t really get Gloria. I have no idea what she’s thinking.
Haha.
If you say that, poor Gloria.
Oh, I just voiced the Boss's inner thoughts.
It feels like we should at least get a call.
Günter seemed like a scary person.
Wasn’t he in a bad mood?
Sure, he was forced to squeeze time for me.
Yeah.
No! You shouldn’t do stuff like that!
You shouldn’t!
What the Boss did is like blasphemy against God.
That's quite an exaggeration.
500,000 patients in Manhattan will resent the Boss.
Where on earth does that number come from?
I-I’m fine with it! It’s just the vibe, the vibe!
Please don’t disturb me again.
Günter is a good person.
And he is incredibly busy.
That’s probably true.
But what I want to know isn’t that.
He’s currently the most reputed psychiatrist in New York.
I once went to Counseling with a teacher.
Really? Is that so?
Yeah.
I had a tough time before.
But now I'm feeling this energetic.
I'm fine. He's a trustworthy teacher.
Gabriela had been keeping a secret from me.
Wait, Boss, when did you two get that close?!
I guess I phrased that poorly.
I was just joking.
I felt like making a quip.
So, did something happen?
Actually, it might not just be a simple person search; I could end up finding a dead person.
Wait, a murder case!? Yay!
I know it's wrong to take joy in someone's misfortune, but it feels so detective-like.
Ugh, I'm so happy!
I'm starting to feel really gloomy.
What are you talking about? Life is just beginning!
Let's do our best, Boss!
You left, and I got two calls. She's impatient, isn't she?
Ugh.
Well, I definitely felt like she wouldn’t waste even a second.
That's why you'll age quickly. Your voice sounded so old.
What are you saying?
I'm just going to live a relaxed life.
So, what kind of person was he?
The president of an Escort Service company.
The Escort Service is...
...a service where a cool guy escorts you at a party, right?
Are you being serious?
Did I say something strange?
Hehe.
If that's the kind of service, I'd like to try it too.
Ah.
I'm feeling gloomy.
Honestly, I'm starting to think it might be impossible for me.
Ugh.
Hmm, what should I do?
I have to tell Meryl the truth, but...
Searching for Ariana is probably almost impossible now.
When should I go tell Meryl?
When we talked, she was surprisingly normal. It's comforting, but...
On the flip side, I wonder why I feel like something's off.
If he really recovers, then that's all that matters.
It's somewhat reassuring that he's under the counselor's care, but...
But I wonder if that's actually a good thing for her.
Considering her situation, I think Gai returning is the best medicine, but he's missing.
With Gai,
is it impossible to go back to how things were?
If he’s already back, then there's no issue.
But if he isn't, where could he be and what is he doing?
I'm worried about Cindy too, but there are too many problems on my plate right now.
I should stop thinking about her for now.
I'm already exhausted and have no energy left.
At this point, she's definitely out there looking for me.
Günter may be an excellent psychiatrist, but he's not my type.
I felt something stir up my anxiety when I was in front of him, but why was that?
I need to meet Dr. Günter at least once.
What kind of person is a reputed psychiatrist, I wonder?
I can understand Gabriela's feelings, but I wish she had mentioned the wrist incident first.
That said,
I thought it was just a simple person search, but I might have stumbled into a troublesome situation.
Through Director Fabar's connections, it's another request to find someone.
Since that party, it's great that work has gotten busier, but there are definitely a lot of struggles too.
If she's the owner of an escort service, she might have been a call girl herself.
※※※　It's a bug　※※※
Ｖ＝
